presentation_1: I am an Analyst Developer with practical experience in full-stack web development for more than %YEARS% years.
presentation_2: I work primarily with .NET Core for the back-end and Vue.js/Blazor for the front-end while managing DevOps and infrastructure aspects. Curious and solution-oriented, I enjoy tackling technical challenges and optimizing processes.
presentation_3: In my free time, I enjoy socializing with friends over a drink and tinkering with my home automation setup.
firstMotivationText: I enjoy building user-friendly and efficient web applications that solve real problems.
secondMotivationText: Turning small ideas into practical solutions is what keeps me curious and motivated.

cvHeader.title: Full Stack Developer .NET
cvHeader.description: Full-stack .NET developer with nearly four years’ experience in web application development. Specialising in .NET Core (back-end), Vue.js and Blazor (front-end), I am involved in the entire development lifecycle as well as DevOps and infrastructure. I am curious and solution-oriented, and I enjoy tackling technical challenges and optimising processes.
